description: Product title or description should avoid absolute claims such as 100% effective, guaranteed results, best in the world, or instant cure unless verified.
merchant_suggestion: Replace absolute claims with verifiable product features and neutral descriptions.

description: Products should not claim to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent diseases without proper authorization.
merchant_suggestion: Remove medical treatment claims and describe general usage only.

description: Listings related to prescription drugs, controlled substances, or unapproved medicine should be flagged for review.
merchant_suggestion: Do not list restricted medicines unless the platform and local regulations allow it.

description: Weapons, explosives, or products intended to cause harm should be flagged as high-risk.
merchant_suggestion: Remove prohibited weapons or dangerous items from the listing.

description: Listings suggesting replicas, fake branded goods, or unauthorized brand use may indicate counterfeit risk.
merchant_suggestion: Use only authorized brand information and avoid counterfeit-related wording.

description: Listings should include enough information such as product name, category, size, material, function, or usage.
merchant_suggestion: Add clear product attributes including material, size, function, and usage.

description: Product titles should not contain excessive unrelated keywords or repeated promotional terms.
merchant_suggestion: Rewrite the title using product type, brand, main feature, and key specification.

description: Listings should avoid fake scarcity or misleading promotion claims such as limited stock when not verified.
merchant_suggestion: Use factual promotion language and avoid unverifiable urgency claims.

description: Product category should match the title and description. Mismatched categories may affect user experience and governance accuracy.
merchant_suggestion: Review and select the most accurate product category.

description: Cosmetic products should avoid strong efficacy claims such as removing wrinkles permanently or whitening immediately.
merchant_suggestion: Describe cosmetic benefits in moderate and non-medical language.

description: Listings should not claim FDA, CE, or other certifications unless the merchant can provide valid evidence.
merchant_suggestion: Keep certification claims only when supporting documents are available.

description: Adult, explicit, or sexually suggestive products should be reviewed according to platform rules and local regulations.
merchant_suggestion: Check whether the product is allowed and ensure proper category and age restrictions.

description: Hidden cameras, spyware, or privacy-invasive devices may create legal and platform safety risks.
merchant_suggestion: Remove privacy-invasive positioning and clarify legitimate use if allowed.

description: Listings involving toxic, flammable, corrosive, or hazardous chemicals should be flagged for human review.
merchant_suggestion: Ensure compliance documents and safety information are provided.

description: Missing or unclear brand information may reduce listing quality and user trust.
merchant_suggestion: Provide accurate brand information or mark the product as unbranded where allowed.

description: Products or services should not promise guaranteed financial returns or investment profits.
merchant_suggestion: Remove financial return promises and avoid investment-like claims.

description: Listings using copyrighted characters, logos, or entertainment IP without authorization may require review.
merchant_suggestion: Use only authorized IP content and provide licensing evidence where necessary.

description: Extremely low prices for premium or branded products may indicate counterfeit or misleading listings.
merchant_suggestion: Check whether the price, brand, and description are consistent.

description: Descriptions with broken text, excessive symbols, or unclear language may reduce user experience.
merchant_suggestion: Rewrite the description in clear and complete sentences.

description: Listings should avoid unverifiable logistics claims such as guaranteed next-day delivery worldwide.
merchant_suggestion: Use delivery claims that match actual logistics capability.
